synopsis:
The story opens in the ravaged underworld of Coruscant, where the deformed Twi'lek Alema Rar hunts Jacen Solo in revenge for their past duels during the Dark Nest Crisis. Alema realizes she is herself being stalked by the Sith Lumiya and follows her back to Jacen, who is conferring with the World Brain about the Galactic Alliance Guard's raids on Corellian terrorists. Alema's attempt to kill Jacen with a blowgun misses and strikes the World Brain instead; Lumiya, rather than let Jacen give in to rage, urges him to master his emotions and spare his attacker.

Meanwhile, Han and Leia Solo, having sided with the Corellian insurgents against the Galactic Alliance, are brought aboard a Corellian flagship to meet Dur Gejjen and his allies. The Corellians want the Solos to persuade Hapan Queen Mother Tenel Ka Djo to bring the Hapes Consortium over to Corellia's side, a difficult task given Hapes's loyalty to the Alliance. But when the Solos discover that the plan actually depends on Hapan nobles murdering their pro-Alliance queen and her daughter, they resolve to protect Tenel Ka instead.

As the conflict widens, Luke Skywalker grows fearful that his son Ben and his nephew Jacen are being corrupted by Lumiya, and sends the Jedi Master Tresina Lobi to spy on them. Alema and Lumiya intercept and kill Lobi to push Jacen further toward the dark side. The Solos' effort to save the queen cannot undo the consequences of their choices, which turn family against family and set Luke on a collision course with his fiercest enemy, even as Jacen's growing power draws Han and Leia into peril at the hands of their own son.
title: Tempest
